title: Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam
tagline: Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Egowriamman Temple is a Hindu temple at Vallam in Thanjavur in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, South India, India.
overview.description: Egowriamman Temple is a Hindu temple at Vallam in Thanjavur in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, South India, India. There is a two-headed statue of Mother Ambika in the temple, sitting on a lotus-shaped Peeta. One face is ferocious, with long and sharp teeth showing her destructive side against the demons. The other face is calm, smiling and graceful, protecting the devotees and righteous from evils.

topPlaces.name: Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary is a protected area and bird sanctuary located in Thanjavur of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The sanctuary covers an area of 0.64 km2 (0.25 sq mi) and was notified in 2015.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (38 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (40 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam?
faq.a: Stays in Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Egowri Amman Temple, Vallam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vallam, Kalvirayampettai, Marudakkudi, Neelagiri, Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary.
